Home.title: Treat yourself to
Home.subtitle: Discover a world that rivals the most prestigious global brands in quality, yet stays accessible for your everyday joy. Because premium care shouldn't be a rare treat.
Home.benefitsSubtitle: I believe that top-tier care should be a standard, not a privilege. Atomy combines visionary science with a fair approach — eliminating costly advertising and middlemen so you're left with pure quality at a price that delights you every day.
Home.benefit1Desc: Behind every cream stands the prestigious biotech company Kolmar Korea. These are technologies that once belonged only to the most luxury brands, now ready to pamper your skin with maximum effectiveness.
Home.benefit2Desc: Luxury brand quality at prices that make sense. Thanks to direct production links, you don't pay for a brand name or shopping centre rent — only for what matters most: the ingredients.
Home.benefit3Desc: I use Atomy products every day and keep discovering new possibilities this system offers. Whether you're unsure about choosing products or have questions about the range or partnership, I'm here for you — happy to share my experience and help you find what truly makes sense for you.
Home.produktySubtitle: I've selected the best of Korean science to care for your skin and vitality with uncompromising gentleness.
Home.ctaDesc: Working with Atomy is flexible, with no upfront costs and team support. Whether you're looking for extra income or a new direction — I'll show you how.
Home.aboutTitle: I was looking for luxury I wouldn't have to give up.
Home.aboutText1:
My journey began when I realised that drugstore products were no longer enough for my skin. I longed for the quality of premium brands, but the thought of investing that kind of money every month honestly scared me.

Then I discovered Atomy. The shock of realising I could have the same — if not better — luxury experience was indescribable. I was amazed by the incredible lightness, how quickly it absorbed, and the scent that felt like pure aromatherapy. My skin literally transformed before my eyes.
Home.aboutText2: I told myself this was a treasure nobody here knew about. Atomy isn't competing with drugstores; it's competing with the most expensive department stores — but with a fair approach to us women (and men). Today I share this 'gem' with enthusiasm — with ease and faith in every drop.
Home.aboutCta: I want to feel the difference

Products.title: Our products
Products.subtitle: Korean cosmetics and wellness products for everyday care. Absolute quality at an absolute price.
Products.helpDesc: Write to me and we'll find the perfect products for your skin type and needs.

absolute.name: Absolute CellActive Skincare
absolute.shortDesc: The pinnacle of Korean science for skin rejuvenation.
absolute.tagline: The feeling of absolute luxury — working at the cellular level.
absolute.intro: Absolute CellActive is Atomy's flagship Korean skincare line. A premium range with stem cell technology that visibly reduces wrinkles and restores youthful radiance. Scientifically proven formula developed at KAERI laboratories.
absolute.problem: Your skin is losing firmness, wrinkles are deepening and regular cosmetics aren't enough? You try one cream after another but results never come? You feel like premium care has to cost a fortune?
absolute.usp1Desc: Patented formula with plant stem cells for deep skin regeneration at the cellular level.
absolute.usp2Desc: Toner, serum, ampoule, eye cream, lotion and nutrition cream — complete care that works in synergy.
absolute.usp3Desc: Clinical tests proved improved hydration and wrinkle reduction after just 4 weeks of regular use.
absolute.testimonial: After a month of using Absolute CellActive, my friends were asking what I'm doing differently. My skin is smoother, firmer and simply glows.
absolute.techDetails: The Absolute CellActive range uses a patented complex from Uttwiler Spätlauber plant stem cells that supports the skin's natural renewal processes. The formula is enriched with hyaluronic acid, peptides and Korean herbal extracts. All products are dermatologically tested, paraben-free and without artificial colorants. Developed at KAERI laboratories with over 25 years of research.

fame.name: The Fame Skincare
fame.tagline: Your daily dose of freshness and strength for the skin barrier.
fame.intro: The Fame is Atomy's most luxurious line. Developed for demanding and mature skin that requires intensive care. Concentrated active ingredients for maximum effectiveness — all at a fraction of the price of typical luxury brands.
fame.problem: You invest in expensive cosmetics but the results don't match the price? Your skin is tired, lacks glow and regular products aren't enough? Looking for something that truly works — without spending your entire salary?

hemohim.name: HemoHIM
hemohim.shortDesc: Your inner strength and immunity in balance.
hemohim.tagline: When you want to give your body deep regeneration and energy.
hemohim.intro: HemoHIM is a unique herbal extract developed by the Korean research institute KAERI. Eight years of scientific research led to a product that supports the natural immune system and overall vitality.
hemohim.problem: You often feel tired, colds won't let go and energy is gone? You try vitamins and supplements but nothing works long-term? You want something backed by real scientific research — not just marketing promises?

evening.name: Evening Care
evening.shortDesc: A home spa ritual for perfectly clean skin.
evening.tagline: Four steps to professional cleansing in the comfort of your home.
evening.intro: Evening Care is Atomy's essential daily cleansing and care line. Gently yet effectively removes impurities and makeup while hydrating and preparing the skin for the next steps of your beauty routine. The ideal start with Korean cosmetics.
evening.problem: You only use one product for cleansing and feel like your skin isn't truly clean? Your skin feels dry and tight after washing? You want to start a Korean routine but don't know where?

cica.name: Derma Real Cica
cica.shortDesc: A gentle embrace for the most sensitive skin.
cica.tagline: Instant relief and regeneration through the power of herbs.
cica.intro: Derma Real Cica is a special line designed for sensitive, irritated and problematic skin. Centella asiatica (cica) is a legendary Korean herb known for its regenerative and anti-inflammatory effects.
cica.problem: Your skin is sensitive and reacts to everything? Redness, irritation, dry patches? You're afraid to try new cosmetics because you never know how your skin will react?

sunscreen.name: Atomy Absolute Essence Sunscreen
sunscreen.shortDesc: SPF50+ protection that brightens and shields your skin every day

sunCushion.name: Atomy Urban Shield Sun Cushion
sunCushion.shortDesc: Sunscreen, skincare and base in one

resetBalm.shortDesc: Instant hydration and visibly smoother skin

herbalSampon.shortDesc: Herbal shampoo for strong, clean and nourished hair

herbalKondicioner.name: Atomy Herbal Conditioner

OAtomy.label: About the company
OAtomy.title: Atomy — Korean quality for the world
OAtomy.intro: Atomy is a South Korean company bringing world-class products at fair prices. No unnecessary middlemen, no inflated margins — direct from the manufacturer to you.
OAtomy.philSubtitle: Atomy's philosophy stands on two pillars — products must be the best in their class while remaining affordable for everyone.
OAtomy.qualityDesc: Products developed in KAERI research institute laboratories. Verified patents and certifications.
OAtomy.priceDesc: Direct from manufacturer without distribution chains. Premium quality at drugstore prices.
OAtomy.customerDesc: GSGS strategy — Global Sourcing, Global Selling. The best ingredients from around the world for you.

Spoluprace.label: Business opportunity
Spoluprace.title: Work with Atomy
Spoluprace.subtitle: Looking for a flexible way to earn extra? Working with Atomy is risk-free, with no upfront costs and support from experienced mentors.
Spoluprace.step1Desc: No entry fees, no mandatory purchases. Registration takes 2 minutes and is completely non-binding.
Spoluprace.step2Desc: Order your favorite products at member prices. Use them, test them, share your experience.
Spoluprace.step3Desc: Recommend products to your network. For each purchase from your contacts, you earn commission and build passive income.
Spoluprace.whyDesc: Atomy isn't your typical MLM. No inventory, no mandatory purchases, no entry fees. Just a fair system that rewards your activity.
Spoluprace.closingDesc: Write to me and let's chat with no obligation. I'll explain how it all works, answer your questions and help you with the first steps.
